pageDescription: Freelance Web & Software Developer based in Marche, Italy. I build fast, SEO-optimized websites and custom apps. Contact me for a free quote today!

images.profileAlt: Portrait of Leonardo Castignani, Software and Web Developer in Civitanova Marche, Italy.
images.socialAlt: High-performance web design and custom software development services in Italy.

hero.title: Leonardo Castignani
hero.subtitle: Freelance Web & Software Developer. I create fast websites, custom applications, and modern digital experiences for businesses and individuals.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a freelance programmer and web developer based in the Marche region, currently completing a degree in Computer Science at the University of Camerino. I specialize in modern website creation and software development, combining advanced technical skills with a strong focus on usability and SEO.
about.p2: I approach every project with an analytical approach: from a simple showcase site to complex web applications. I believe in code quality and actively participate in the open-source community to stay up-to-date on the latest technologies.

educationDetails.degree: High School Diploma in Computer Science

certificationDetails.title: Robotics License
certificationDetails.description: Certification on the basic skills for the use and programming of industrial robots.

certificationDetails.title: ICDL Full Standard
certificationDetails.description: Comprehensive certification of digital skills, including specialized modules like IT-Security and Web-Editing.

experiences.description: Design and development of responsive websites and custom software. I manage the entire digital product lifecycle: requirements analysis, front-end/back-end development, performance optimization, and final release.

Actively contributed to analyzing and resolving bugs in existing applications, improving software stability. I also collaborated on developing new features, applying testing and debugging methodologies in a professional environment.
First experience in a corporate setting, where I supported the development team with programming tasks and learned team dynamics and industry best practices under the guidance of senior developers.

projects.title: Projects
projects.githubDescription: I am currently polishing some personal projects to make them public. In the meantime, feel free to explore my repositories, university exercises, and the source code of this portfolio directly on GitHub.

blog.description: Development notes, tutorials, and project updates.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit this site.
privacy.dataControllerText: The Data Controller for the data collected through this site is Leonardo Castignani, reachable at info@leonardocastignani.it.
privacy.dataText: When you fill out the contact form, we collect the information you provide, such as name, email, and message, solely to reply to you. We do not share this information with third parties.
privacy.cookieText1: This site uses cookies to improve your experience. The cookies used are listed below:
privacy.cookieTypesIntro: Cookies on this site fall into two categories:
privacy.technicalCookiesText: Essential for the site to work correctly (e.g. storing your consent choice). They do not require prior consent, as they are necessary to provide the service.
privacy.analyticsCookiesText: Through Google Tag Manager, analytics cookies (e.g. Google Analytics) may be activated to understand how visitors use the site, in aggregated and anonymized form. These cookies are activated ONLY if you choose "Accept all" in the cookie banner, in line with Google Consent Mode: by default all tracking is set to "denied" until you give explicit consent.

cookieConsent.title: Technical Consent Cookie (cookieconsent_status)
cookieConsent.text: This cookie stores your choice regarding cookie consent ("all" or "required only"), so the banner is not shown again on every visit. It lasts 12 months.

privacy.cookieText2: No profiling cookie is installed without your explicit consent.
privacy.legalBasisText: Processing of technical cookies is based on the Controller's legitimate interest in the proper functioning of the site. Processing of analytics cookies is based on your explicit consent, which you can withdraw at any time.
privacy.retentionText: Data collected through the contact form is kept for as long as needed to respond to your request. The technical cookie that stores your consent choice lasts 12 months, after which your consent will be requested again. Analytics cookies set by Google, if you consent, follow the retention periods set by Google itself (up to 24 months): see Google's Cookie Policy for up-to-date details.
privacy.manageConsentText: You can change your choice at any time by deleting this site's cookies from your browser settings: on your next visit, the consent banner will be shown again.
privacy.rightsText: As a data subject, you have the right to access your personal data, request rectification or erasure, object to processing, request restriction or portability, and lodge a complaint with the competent Data Protection Authority.
privacy.contactText: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact me through the form on this site or by email.
privacy.backButton: Back to where you left off

cookieModal.title: Your privacy matters
cookieModal.description: We use cookies to give you the best experience on the site and to analyze traffic in aggregate form. You can accept all cookies or continue with only the technical cookies required for the site to function.
